rulings.Case Title: THORNTON TOMASETTI, INC. VS. REAL ESTATE EQUITY EXCHANGE, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment , Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 28, 2021 line 3. Motion For Summary Judgment , Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc. is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication as to the cause of action for breach of contract is DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding remedies under the contract. Motion for summary adjudication as to the cause of action for indemnity is denied. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that this cause of action is ripe. =(501/CFH)
